Every descriptor row is descriptor_only:true / runtime_execution:false / customer_safe_errors_only:true / raw_payload_included:false. Post-review gated commands (closeout-pack:validate, plan:generate, --cached diff) are correctly deferred per the hardened review sequence.

Boundaries: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor.
